name: Gonzo's HD Sports
about: Gonzo's HD Sports is an indoor golf and sports simulation venue in South Burlington, VT. It features 8 Trackman iO golf simulators using patented optically enhanced radar tracking technology. The facility also offers a full bar, a sports bar with a drink menu, and event hosting capabilities for parties and corporate events. Golf instruction is available with PGA Lessons utilizing Trackman technology and V1 Pressure Mat. The venue caters to a diverse range of patrons from casual players to serious golfers and those looking for a social outing or event space.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman iO simulator technology for highly accurate ball and club tracking
PGA-level instruction available using Trackman data and V1 Pressure Mat for detailed swing analysis
Online tee time booking system for convenient and easy session scheduling
Full bar service available on-site for a complete social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food delivery is permitted (Ramunto's Brick Oven Pizza is mentioned as a partner), and guests can bring their own caterer.
Full bar with beer and cocktails available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Patented optically enhanced radar tracking (OERT) technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food delivery is permitted, and guests can bring their own caterer. A full bar with beer and cocktails is also available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time required to play 18 holes, but it mentions online tee time booking, indicating sessions can be scheduled based on availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as a place for all ages and specifically mentions it is 'the place to celebrate' for people from age 8 to 60, with a variety of games including golf and sports simulators suitable for kids.
